templates.name: homepage
templates.description: Wells Fargo consumer homepage with hero promo, product navigation, promo tile carousel, feature highlights, app promo, community columns, help-cta, and disclaimers

blocks.name: hero
blocks.notes: Image + heading + CTA, no multiple h3s

blocks.name: cards
blocks.variant: separator (with images), icons, icons-middle, highlight, bg-light, bg-image
blocks.notes: Images with icons (<=100px) = icons variant; larger images = separator; no images = default Cards (auto-handled)

blocks.name: accordion
blocks.notes: Groups consecutive <details> siblings into one block

templates.name: product-landing
templates.description: Wells Fargo product landing pages — uses smart auto-detection for block mapping. Supports multiple heroes, cards with/without images, accordion FAQs, and disclaimers.

blocks.name: hero
blocks.notes: Multiple heroes per page supported. Detected by: image + heading + optional CTA, not multiple h3s

blocks.name: cards
blocks.variant: separator (with images), icons, icons-middle, highlight, bg-light, bg-image
blocks.notes: Images with icons (<=100px) = icons variant; larger images = separator; no images = default Cards (auto-handled)

blocks.name: accordion
blocks.notes: Groups consecutive <details> siblings. FAQ questions use <h3> in col1, answer in col2
